context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the phoenix-uploads instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill before implementing ANY file upload functionality.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use manual uploads (NOT `auto_upload: true`)** for form submission patterns

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Always add upload directory to `static_paths()`** — files won't be accessible without this

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify** — confirm upload directory exists, files are saved, and URLs resolve correctly

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: > **Note:** Avoid `auto_upload: true` with form submission patterns — it is only appropriate when files must upload immediately on selection via a `handle_progress/3` callback.
